boundaries.body: Jyotish can show timing, tendencies, pressure points, and remedies. It should not be used as a guaranteed verdict.
items: Exact birth time and place matter. A few minutes can change houses, divisional charts, and event timing.
Unknown or doubtful birth time should be handled with rectification before deep timing.
Predictions are probability and guidance, not guarantees.
Medical, legal, financial, crisis, and emergency decisions still need qualified real-world support.
Remedies are given as traditional, reflective, and karma-aligned practices, not guaranteed cures.
boundaries.title: Honest limits make the reading more trustworthy.

calculation.body: Predicta starts from birth details, then keeps the method visible so the user can understand where a reading comes from.

items.detail: Used for the regular Parashari Kundli and most divisional chart work.
items.label: Zodiac

items.detail: Predicta uses Lahiri for regular Vedic calculations unless a school clearly needs its own method.
items.label: Ayanamsa

items.detail: The app renders North Indian charts because that is the product standard.
items.label: Chart style

items.detail: Vimshottari is anchored to the Moon nakshatra and then interpreted with chart proof.
items.label: Dasha

items.detail: Gochar is refreshed for the current date and read against the active Kundli.
items.label: Transit

calculation.title: The chart method is clear before the prediction.

cta.note: The goal is not blind belief. The goal is a clear, respectful reading with visible method and honest limits.

depth.body: Predicta does not hide basic charts from free users. The difference is explanation depth, synthesis, timing, remedies, and polished reports.
free: All available charts can be viewed.
Useful insight for each major chart or topic.
Basic dasha, Sade Sati, Gochar, and report previews.
Short chart proof in plain language.
premium: Detailed synthesis across D1, divisional charts, dasha, Gochar, and remedies.
Deeper KP and premium Nadi-style pattern reading where available.
Report-ready explanations, monthly timing, and richer follow-up guidance.
More complete family, relationship, and life-calendar workflows.
depth.title: Free shows the chart. Premium explains it deeply.

hero.body: See the Jyotish method behind Predicta: how charts are calculated, how Parashari, KP, and Nadi stay separate, and where astrology needs human judgment.
hero.title: A transparent method builds better trust.

pillars.body: Every serious answer should show the chart factors behind it, not just a confident sentence.
pillars.title: Chart proof first

pillars.body: Regular Predicta, KP Predicta, and Nadi Predicta have different rules and should not be casually mixed.
pillars.title: Schools stay separate

pillars.body: Birth time sensitivity, uncertainty, and safety limits are stated clearly instead of hidden.
pillars.title: Clear boundaries

schools.body: Predicta treats these as separate rooms of Jyotish. A handoff can carry the user question and birth details, but each school answers from its own rules.

items.caution: D1 stays the root. Vargas, Bhav Chalit, dasha, and Gochar support the reading.
items.name: Regular Parashari
items.summary: Traditional Vedic Jyotish for lifelong patterns, life areas, timing, and holistic guidance.

items.caution: KP is not a side section. It has its own method and should answer event questions from KP rules.
items.name: KP Predicta
items.summary: Krishnamurti Paddhati for precise event-oriented judgment and timing.

items.caution: Nadi Predicta never claims access to a real ancient palm-leaf manuscript.
items.name: Nadi Predicta
items.summary: A premium pattern-reading room for karmic narratives and repeated life signatures.

schools.title: Different astrology schools need different rules.

boundaries.body: ज्योतिष समय, प्रवृत्ति, दबाव और उपाय दिखा सकता है. इसे guaranteed verdict की तरह उपयोग नहीं करना चाहिए.
items: सटीक जन्म समय और स्थान जरूरी हैं. कुछ minutes houses, divisional charts और timing बदल सकते हैं.
Unknown या doubtful birth time में deep timing से पहले rectification useful है.
Predictions probability और guidance हैं, guarantee नहीं.
Medical, legal, financial, crisis और emergency decisions में qualified real-world support जरूरी है.
Remedies traditional, reflective और karma-aligned practices हैं, guaranteed cure नहीं.
boundaries.title: ईमानदार सीमाएं reading को ज्यादा भरोसेमंद बनाती हैं.

calculation.body: Predicta जन्म विवरण से शुरू करती है और method visible रखती है ताकि user समझ सके reading कहां से आई.

items.detail: Regular Parashari कुंडली और ज्यादातर divisional chart work के लिए.
items.label: राशि पद्धति

items.detail: Regular Vedic calculations में Lahiri use होता है, जब तक किसी school को अपनी method न चाहिए.
items.label: Ayanamsa

items.detail: Product standard North Indian chart style है.
items.label: चार्ट style

items.detail: Vimshottari Moon nakshatra से anchored होती है और chart proof के साथ पढ़ी जाती है.
items.label: दशा

items.detail: गोचर वर्तमान date के लिए refresh होता है और active कुंडली से पढ़ा जाता है.
items.label: गोचर

calculation.title: फलादेश से पहले चार्ट विधि साफ रहती है.

cta.note: लक्ष्य blind belief नहीं है. लक्ष्य clear, respectful reading है जिसमें method और limits visible हों.

depth.body: Predicta free users से basic charts hide नहीं करती. Difference explanation depth, synthesis, timing, remedies और polished reports का है.
free: Available charts देखे जा सकते हैं.
हर major chart या topic के लिए useful insight.
Basic dasha, Sade Sati, Gochar और report previews.
Plain language में short chart proof.
premium: D1, divisional charts, dasha, Gochar और remedies की detailed synthesis.
जहां available हो वहां deeper KP और premium Nadi-style pattern reading.
Report-ready explanations, monthly timing और richer follow-up guidance.
Family, relationship और life-calendar workflows ज्यादा complete.
depth.title: मुफ्त chart दिखाता है. प्रीमियम उसे deeply समझाता है.

hero.body: Predicta के पीछे की ज्योतिष method देखें: charts कैसे calculate होते हैं, Parashari, KP और Nadi कैसे अलग रहते हैं, और astrology में human judgment कहां जरूरी है.
hero.title: पारदर्शी विधि से भरोसा बेहतर बनता है.

pillars.body: Serious answer में confident sentence के साथ chart factors भी दिखने चाहिए.
pillars.title: चार्ट प्रमाण पहले

pillars.body: Regular Predicta, KP Predicta और Nadi Predicta के rules अलग हैं. इन्हें casually mix नहीं किया जाता.
pillars.title: Schools अलग रहते हैं

pillars.body: Birth time sensitivity, uncertainty और safety limits साफ कही जाती हैं.
pillars.title: साफ सीमाएं

schools.body: Predicta इन्हें ज्योतिष के separate rooms मानती है. Handoff में question और birth details जा सकते हैं, लेकिन हर school अपने rules से answer करता है.

items.caution: D1 root रहता है. Vargas, Bhav Chalit, dasha और Gochar reading को support करते हैं.
items.name: Regular Parashari
items.summary: Traditional Vedic Jyotish जो lifelong patterns, life areas, timing और holistic guidance पढ़ता है.

items.caution: KP side section नहीं है. इसका अपना method है और event questions KP rules से answer होने चाहिए.
items.name: KP Predicta
items.summary: Krishnamurti Paddhati precise event-oriented judgment और timing के लिए.

items.caution: Nadi Predicta कभी real ancient palm-leaf manuscript access करने का fake claim नहीं करती.
items.name: Nadi Predicta
items.summary: Karmic narratives और repeated life signatures के लिए premium pattern-reading room.

schools.title: हर ज्योतिष school को अपनी विधि चाहिए.

boundaries.body: જ્યોતિષ સમય, પ્રવૃત્તિ, દબાણ અને ઉપાયો બતાવી શકે છે. તેને guaranteed verdict તરીકે ઉપયોગ ન કરવું.
items: ચોક્કસ જન્મ સમય અને સ્થળ જરૂરી છે. થોડા minutes houses, divisional charts અને timing બદલી શકે છે.
Unknown અથવા doubtful birth time હોય તો deep timing પહેલાં rectification useful છે.
Predictions probability અને guidance છે, guarantee નહીં.
Medical, legal, financial, crisis અને emergency decisions માટે qualified real-world support જરૂરી છે.
Remedies traditional, reflective અને karma-aligned practices છે, guaranteed cure નહીં.
boundaries.title: ઈમાનદાર મર્યાદાઓ reading ને વધુ trustworthy બનાવે છે.

calculation.body: Predicta જન્મ વિગતો થી શરૂ કરે છે અને method visible રાખે છે જેથી user સમજી શકે reading ક્યાંથી આવી.

items.detail: Regular Parashari કુંડળી અને મોટાભાગના divisional chart work માટે.
items.label: રાશિ પદ્ધતિ

items.detail: Regular Vedic calculations માં Lahiri use થાય છે, જ્યાં સુધી કોઈ school ને પોતાની method ન જોઈએ.
items.label: Ayanamsa

items.detail: Product standard North Indian chart style છે.
items.label: ચાર્ટ style

items.detail: Vimshottari Moon nakshatra થી anchored છે અને chart proof સાથે વાંચાય છે.
items.label: દશા

items.detail: ગોચર current date માટે refresh થાય છે અને active કુંડળી સામે વાંચાય છે.
items.label: ગોચર

calculation.title: ફળકથન પહેલાં ચાર્ટ પદ્ધતિ સ્પષ્ટ રહે છે.

cta.note: લક્ષ્ય blind belief નથી. લક્ષ્ય clear, respectful reading છે જેમાં method અને limits visible હોય.

depth.body: Predicta free users થી basic charts hide કરતી નથી. Difference explanation depth, synthesis, timing, remedies અને polished reports નો છે.
free: દરેક major chart અથવા topic માટે useful insight.
Basic dasha, Sade Sati, Gochar અને report previews.
Plain language માં short chart proof.
premium: D1, divisional charts, dasha, Gochar અને remedies ની detailed synthesis.
જ્યાં available હોય ત્યાં deeper KP અને premium Nadi-style pattern reading.
Report-ready explanations, monthly timing અને richer follow-up guidance.
Family, relationship અને life-calendar workflows વધુ complete.
depth.title: મફત chart બતાવે છે. પ્રીમિયમ તેને deeply સમજાવે છે.

hero.body: Predicta પાછળની જ્યોતિષ method જુઓ: charts કેવી રીતે calculate થાય છે, Parashari, KP અને Nadi કેવી રીતે અલગ રહે છે, અને astrology માં human judgment ક્યાં જરૂરી છે.
hero.title: પારદર્શક પદ્ધતિથી ભરોસો વધુ મજબૂત બને છે.

pillars.body: Serious answer માં confident sentence સાથે chart factors પણ દેખાવા જોઈએ.
pillars.title: ચાર્ટ પુરાવો પહેલા

pillars.body: Regular Predicta, KP Predicta અને Nadi Predicta ના rules અલગ છે. તેને casually mix કરવામાં આવતા નથી.
pillars.title: Schools અલગ રહે છે

pillars.body: Birth time sensitivity, uncertainty અને safety limits સ્પષ્ટ કહેવામાં આવે છે.
pillars.title: સ્પષ્ટ મર્યાદા

schools.body: Predicta તેને જ્યોતિષના separate rooms માને છે. Handoff માં question અને birth details જઈ શકે છે, પણ દરેક school પોતાના rules થી answer કરે છે.

items.caution: D1 root રહે છે. Vargas, Bhav Chalit, dasha અને Gochar reading ને support કરે છે.
items.name: Regular Parashari
items.summary: Traditional Vedic Jyotish lifelong patterns, life areas, timing અને holistic guidance માટે.

items.caution: KP side section નથી. તેનો પોતાનો method છે અને event questions KP rules થી answer થવા જોઈએ.
items.name: KP Predicta
items.summary: Krishnamurti Paddhati precise event-oriented judgment અને timing માટે.

items.caution: Nadi Predicta ક્યારેય real ancient palm-leaf manuscript access કરવાનો fake claim કરતી નથી.
items.name: Nadi Predicta
items.summary: Karmic narratives અને repeated life signatures માટે premium pattern-reading room.

schools.title: દરેક જ્યોતિષ school માટે પોતાની પદ્ધતિ જોઈએ.
